prompt_improvements.improvement: Require implementor prompts to cross-check README credential names against actual workflow variable/secret names and explicitly document any mappings.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Prevents setup docs from drifting away from executable CI/CD configuration.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Require an explicit acceptance-criteria-to-section checklist with final line references in the changed markdown file.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Improves traceability and reduces missed documentation requirements.

prompt_improvements.improvement: Require code review to run only after implementation commits are pushed and PR diff is non-empty.
prompt_improvements.rationale: Avoids wasted review cycles and false critical findings caused by empty diffs.
